assets.name: lecture_07_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Best early board frame: the infinite-well sketch is stable and legible, with labeled psi_1(x), psi_2(x), and node structure.

assets.name: lecture_07_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Cleanest unobstructed mid-lecture board state showing the Schrodinger eigenvalue equation, P=-i d/dx, and the 3D replacement by -nabla^2/2m.

assets.name: lecture_07_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Late-lecture board is only partially framed, but it is the best available reference for the emphasized field-energy/Hamiltonian layout with Psi^dagger(x)(-nabla^2/2m+V(x)).
